name: CARNIVAL CORP
summary: Carnival Corporation & plc is the largest global cruise company, operating a portfolio of eight world-class cruise lines: AIDA Cruises, Carnival Cruise Line, Costa Cruises, Cunard, Holland America Line, P&O Cruises, Princess Cruises, and Seabourn. Incorporated in Panama in 1974, the company operates as a dual listed company with Carnival plc, serving over 13.5 million guests annually with a team of more than 160,000 individuals from approximately 150 countries.
